item.name: Tales of Adventure: One White Mage's Journey I
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's path to becoming a realm-renowned white mage─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level white mage to 60 and complete all job quests up through “Hands of Healing.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
